nasb.text: It happened as David was coming to the summit, where God was worshiped, that behold, Hushai the Archite met him with his coat torn and dust on his head.

esv.text: While David was coming to the summit, where God was worshiped, behold, Hushai the Archite came to meet him with his coat torn and dirt on his head.

cnv.text: 大衛到了山頂，就是人敬拜　神的地方。看哪！有亞基人戶篩衣服撕裂，頭蒙灰塵，在那裡迎接他。

ccb.text: 大卫来到山顶敬拜上帝的地方，看见亚基人户筛撕破了衣服，头蒙灰尘前来迎接他。
